name: Doppler Effect Calculator
description: Free online doppler effect calculator. Enter source frequency and source velocity to get instant results.
seo_description: Use our free doppler effect calculator to quickly estimate f_obs based on f0, v_source, v_observer. Not registration needed.
example_label: Calculate observed frequency when source mov is at 25 m/s toward observer moving at 10 m/s.
result_context: The observed frequency {f_obs} Hz chang is due to relative motion between source and observer.
steps: Source frequency f₀ = 500 Hz, v_sound = 343 m/s
Source velocity vₛ = 25 m/s (toward observer, positive)
Observer velocity vₒ = 10 m/s (toward source, positive)
mistakes: Using wrong sign convention for velocities
Confusing source and observer velocity positions in formula
Not accounting for direction of motion (toward vs away)
desc: Free online doppler effect calculator. Enter source frequency and source velocity to get instant results.
